description: Get running with these reebok Instant shoes. A running shoe built for the runner who requires enhanced cushioning, these shoes look great when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Mesh upper for optimal breathability Leather overlays provide durable support Padded collar and tongue for extra comfort Mesh tongue for added breath ability White lace-ups for a snug Fit Midsole EVA midsole gives greater cushioning and shock absorption Outsole DMX Ride on the outsole offers plush cushioning for enhanced comfort Carbon rubber heel supplies exceptional durability and traction Forefoot flex grooves allow the foot to move more fluidly throughout the gait cycle Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
